start..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type','roomId','ruleset','rulesVersion','seed','tickRate','hostUid','players','serverTime']) && newData.child('type').val() == 'game/started' && newData.child('ruleset').val() == 'pill-bottle' && newData.child('rulesVersion').val() == 'pill-bottle/controller-1' && newData.child('tickRate').val() == 60 && newData.child('seed').isNumber() && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber()

$commandId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['type','playerId','epochId','clientSeq','tick','serverTime']) && newData.child('playerId').val() == $playerId && newData.child('clientSeq').isNumber() && newData.child('clientSeq').val() >= 1 && newData.child('tick').isNumber() && newData.child('tick').val() >= 0 && newData.child('serverTime').isNumber() && (newData.child('type').val() == 'input/move' || newData.child('type').val() == 'input/rotate' || newData.child('type').val() == 'input/soft-drop-start' || newData.child('type').val() == 'input/soft-drop-end' || newData.child('type').val() == 'input/hard-drop')
